raw_output:
PR #141 security review (Claude, Fable 5). NO FINDINGS. Strings-only scope confirmed: label/copy/comment/test changes plus one static

(hintStyle pre-exists). In the HTML export the replaced cells are static template literals (entities -> plain words); every dynamic value in those rows still flows through _esc(...) or numeric :.0f formatting; no new interpolation sites — escape invariant holds (T-04/T-12). No endpoint, CORS, logging, dependency, or DB-path surface touched (T-01/T-02/T-13/T-16/T-07/T-08). THREAT_MODEL impact 'None' accurate. --- Post-review delta --- Fix round commit 7a77334: C1/Codex-P2 fixed (flex-wrap + row-gap on .consistency-pills and .report-consistency-pills); C2 fixed (analysis delta_7d label -> 'Bedtime Offset (7d avg)', rec copy aligned to 'your recent (7-day) average bedtime'; no tests pinned old strings — grepped); C3 fixed (hint now attributes correctly: bedtime target -> countdown/caffeine marker/consistency stats; wake target -> Auto display-mode schedule); C7 fixed (same corrected hint added to Settings ProfileSection with a .settings-field-hint class matching the Settings hint idiom); C6 fixed (cursor:help removed); C5 partially fixed (PLAN.md:446 user-facing copy example de-Greeked; internal Greek framing left). TOUCH-SET OVERFLOW RECORDED (ship Phase 3 gate): plan predicted frontend-only (ConsistencyMeter, SleepProfileStep, ProfileSection, weekly consistency card, tests); actual lane also touched backend stats_engine VARIABLE_LABELS + reference_data rec copy (the renames genuinely live there — plan's 'ONLY if frontend-side' assumption was wrong), report_service export template, PLAN.md/ARCHITECTURE.md lines, DashboardPage/ReportsPage/SettingsPage CSS. Recorded in the wave-2 report. Post-review commits also include: merge of origin/dev (clean; the shared-file composition with #140's stats_engine edits and #139's report_service edits is exercised by this PR's own CI at the attested hash) and docs/waves/2026-07-22-wave-2-report.md (ship Phase 5: the wave report rides the wave's final PR before attestation; by design it is not itself leg-reviewed). Post-fix verification: backend pytest 550 exit 0 (coverage 97.88%), mypy 0, ruff 0; frontend cold-cache lint 0, format:check 0, vitest 311/44 exit 0, build 0.
